---
title: "Merge and Filter Detections by Calibration Threshold"
author: "Jacqueline Wu"
date: "2026-3-10"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
required_packages <- c(
  "readxl", "dplyr", "stringr", "readr",
  "writexl", "janitor", "tibble", "vroom"
)

installed <- rownames(installed.packages())
for (p in required_packages) {
  if (!p %in% installed) install.packages(p)
}

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(writexl)
library(janitor)
library(tibble)
library(vroom)
```
#### read file
```{r}
path_hoh <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs/Hoh/Hoh_ALL_plots.csv"
path_cw <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs/Clearwater/Clearwater_ALL_plots.csv"
path_ew <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs/Ellsworth/Ellsworth_ALL_plots.csv"

calibration_file <- "C:/Users/jacqu/Downloads/OESF Calibration Results_GioFeb2026.xlsx"
output_dir <- "E:/merge_all/Outputs"

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```
#### standardize key columns in detection data
```{r}
clean_detection_file <- function(path, site_name) {
  vroom::vroom(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE) %>%
    rename(common_name = `Common name`) %>%
    filter(
      `Scientific name` != "Abiotic",
      common_name != "Biotic Insect",
      common_name != "Biotic Anuran",
      !is.na(Confidence),
      Confidence >= 0.5
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      site = site_name,
      plot = plot_number,
      aru = aru_number,
      date = record_date,
      hour = record_hour,
      detection_common_name = common_name,
      start_s = `Start (s)`,
      end_s = `End (s)`,
      detection_confidence = as.numeric(Confidence),
      source = source_file
    )
}
```
#### combine all detection files
```{r}
hoh <- clean_detection_file(path_hoh, "Hoh")
clearwater <- clean_detection_file(path_cw, "Clearwater")
ellsworth <- clean_detection_file(path_ew, "Ellsworth")

all_detections <- bind_rows(ellsworth, clearwater, hoh) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    detection_common_name = str_squish(str_to_lower(as.character(detection_common_name))),
    detection_confidence = as.numeric(detection_confidence)
  )
```
#### clean calibration results
```{r}
calibration_raw <- read_excel(calibration_file) %>%
  clean_names()

calibration <- calibration_raw %>%
  rename(
    calibration_common_name = common_name,
    calibration_threshold = threshold
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    calibration_common_name = str_squish(str_to_lower(as.character(calibration_common_name))),
    calibration_threshold_raw = str_trim(as.character(calibration_threshold)),
    threshold_is_inf = str_to_upper(calibration_threshold_raw) == "INF",
    calibration_threshold_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(calibration_threshold_raw))
  )
```
#### Join detections with calibration thresholds
```{r}
joined_data <- all_detections %>%
  left_join(
    calibration,
    by = c("detection_common_name" = "calibration_common_name")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    threshold_is_inf = ifelse(is.na(calibration_threshold_raw), TRUE, threshold_is_inf),
    calibration_status = case_when(
      is.na(calibration_threshold_raw) ~ "not_in_calibration_treated_as_INF",
      threshold_is_inf ~ "INF_in_calibration",
      TRUE ~ "numeric_threshold"
    )
  )
```
#### Split detections into categories
```{r}
inf_detections <- joined_data %>%
  filter(threshold_is_inf)

kept_detections <- joined_data %>%
  filter(
    !threshold_is_inf,
    !is.na(calibration_threshold_num),
    !is.na(detection_confidence),
    detection_confidence >= calibration_threshold_num
  )

removed_detections <- joined_data %>%
  filter(
    !threshold_is_inf,
    !is.na(calibration_threshold_num),
    !is.na(detection_confidence),
    detection_confidence < calibration_threshold_num
  )
```
#### Export files
```{r}
write_csv(kept_detections, file.path(output_dir, "detections_kept_gte_threshold.csv"))
write_csv(inf_detections, file.path(output_dir, "detections_threshold_INF.csv"))
write_csv(removed_detections, file.path(output_dir, "detections_removed_below_threshold.csv"))
write_csv(all_detections, file.path(output_dir, "detections_Hoh_Ells_CW.csv"))
```
